news.title: Iterum initiates wind-down after failure to offload antibiotic with sluggish sales
news.snippet: Irish antibiotic specialist Iterum Therapeutics has started winding down its operations, citing limited cash amid the expensive commercialization of its only approved product, Orlynvah.

news.title: Still reeling from FDA refusal, IO Biotech surrenders to bankruptcy
news.snippet: Half a year after being spurned by the FDA and following several rounds of deep layoffs, IO Biotech has decided to close its doors for good.

news.title: Obesity biotech Ambrosia scores $100M series B to take next-gen oral GLP-1 into the clinic
news.snippet: Ambrosia Biosciences is aiming to move the market beyond peptide-based obesity treatments and initiate a trial for its oral small-molecule GLP-1 therapy, backed by an oversubscribed $100 million serie

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: Lipella, IO shutter; Takeda plots 634 US job cuts
news.snippet: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: BMS links up with Faro to use AI to improve clinical trial protocols
news.snippet: Bristol Myers Squibb has tapped up Faro to use AI to improve the Big Pharma's clinical trial protocols.

news.title: Lilly pays $6.3B upfront for sleep disorder-focused Centessa in latest neuroscience play
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has gone big in the name of neuroscience, paying $6.3 billion in a front-loaded deal for Centessa Pharmaceuticals and its sleep disorder pipeline.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Ambrosia scores $100M; Gilgamesh's $60M series A
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Merck enlists antibody hunter Infinimmune for $838M biobucks pact
news.snippet: The New Jersey pharma is tapping Infinimmune to hunt for antibodies for as-of-yet undisclosed targets.

news.title: Lipella files for bankruptcy, ending dream of developing mouth inflammation drug
news.snippet: Lipella Pharmaceuticals’ ambition to develop the first treatment for an inflammatory mouth condition has reached the end of the road, with the biotech filing for bankruptcy.

news.title: AstraZeneca’s Strensiq successor misses phase 3 rare disease goal, denting market expansion plan
news.snippet: A phase 3 trial of AstraZeneca’s rare metabolic disease prospect has missed its primary endpoint, raising doubts about the company’s ability to expand beyond the children served by its existing drug.

news.title: Johnson & Johnson’s Impella pumps miss the mark in 2 major coronary studies
news.snippet: Two separate randomized trials failed to illustrate Impella's benefits in specific cases of patients with blocked coronary arteries.

news.title: Astellas axes early Sjögren’s trial in latest setback for autoimmune disease community
news.snippet: Astellas Pharma has become the latest company to pull back from a potential treatment for Sjögren’s syndrome, an autoimmune disease that still lacks any dedicated medicines.

news.title: Blackstone closes record $6.3B life sciences fund
news.snippet: One of the world’s leading investment firms has broken its own record with the closing of its $6.3 billion Blackstone Life Sciences VI (BLXS VI) fund, which is 40% larger than its predecessor.

news.title: Merck dives into detailed phase 3 data showing PCSK9 pill easily outswims rivals
news.snippet: Merck & Co. has lifted the lid on the third successful phase 3 trial of its PCSK9 inhibitor, showing the edge the cardiovascular disease prospect has over other oral non-statin therapies.

news.title: Boston Scientific’s Watchman heart implant measures up to blood thinners in ACC trial
news.snippet: Boston Scientific’s Watchman implant cut bleeding risks almost in half compared to long-term anticoagulant regimens, while showing it was non-inferior in composite measures of stroke and death in peop

news.title: FDA flags serious liver injury cases, 8 deaths with ‘reasonable’ link to Amgen's Tavneos
news.snippet: The agency identified 76 cases of drug-induced liver injury in patients who used Amgen's Tavneos, including eight deaths.

news.title: Novo Nordisk cuts 400 roles at troubled Bloomington site
news.snippet: Amid a major corporate overhaul, Novo Nordisk is pruning the ranks at its Bloomington, Indiana, production facility, which contributes to the blockbuster GLP-1 medications Ozempic and Wegovy.

news.title: Iterum initiates wind-down after failure to offload antibiotic with sluggish sales
news.snippet: Irish antibiotic specialist Iterum Therapeutics has started winding down its operations, citing limited cash amid the expensive commercialization of its only approved product, Orlynvah.

news.title: API supplier BASF raises prices up to 20% in response to rising energy, raw material costs
news.snippet: BASF Pharma Solutions will raise its prices by up to 20% for its excipients and some of its active pharmaceutical ingredients, effective immediately.

news.title: Biogen, eyeing swift commercial tailwind, ponies up $5.6B for Apellis and its 2 approved meds
news.snippet: Biogen is bulking up in immunology—and paving the way for its future ambitions in kidney diseases—with an M&A play that immediately adds two ongoing launches to its marketed drugs portfolio.

news.title: Insulet hires Stryker vet, reinstating commercial chief role as C-suite overhaul continues
news.snippet: Insulet has reinstated the chief commercial officer position three years after eliminating the role to pursue more focused regional and local market execution.

news.title: BMS, Novartis, Gilead, Iovance dinged over biologics promos in rare spate of CBER untitled letters
news.snippet: Promotional materials for a handful of biologics have found their way into the FDA’s hot seat.

news.title: Lilly presses for UK deal that would see higher drug prices in exchange for resumed investments: FT
news.snippet: The company is looking to work out an arrangement with the U.K. government that would see higher drug prices in exchange for Lilly to continue its U.K. investments, according to a report in The Financ

news.title: United plots Tyvaso FDA filing after ph. 3 win elicits talk of 'new IPF standard' and blockbuster sales
news.snippet: With a second phase 3 win for Tyvaso in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), United Therapeutics is padding the case for an expansion and putting more color on its filing plans with the FDA.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: GSK's long-acting Exdensur wins asthma nod in China
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Idorsia eyes pediatric insomnia use with midstage trial win for sleep med Quviviq
news.snippet: After notching a phase 2 trial win, Idorsia’s insomnia med Quviviq is one step closer to potentially becoming a first-in-class treatment for children.

news.title: Takeda begins US layoffs as part of massive $1.3B restructuring
news.snippet: Takeda has started a workforce reduction in the U.S., plotting to cut 634 jobs, as the company aims to save more than $1.26 billion in annual costs.

news.title: Samsung Biologics union gathers votes to strike as tension over wage, governance mounts
news.snippet: The labor union of Samsung Biologics has secured the votes needed to strike, signaling a potential escalation in an impasse over what the union has branded “[u]nresolved governance failures and rigid

news.title: Biogen looks to shake up SMA status quo with FDA nod for high-dose version of Spinraza
news.snippet: Biogen's Spinraza represented a major advance in treating SMA upon its FDA approval nearly a decade ago. It has since ceded some of its competitive positioning as new entrants made their way onto the

news.title: HCP engagement is stuck in the past: here’s how pre-consult precision unlocks what’s next
news.snippet: Forward-looking precision: How pharma can engage providers at the moments that shape care decisions

news.title: STAT+: Baby KJ scientists hit speed bump in quest to scale custom gene editor
news.snippet: The scientists who treated Baby KJ say the FDA's strict standards will make it much harder to create bespoke gene editing for others.

news.title: Supreme Court rules against Colorado ban on ‘conversion therapy’ for LGBTQ kids
news.snippet: The Supreme Court on Tuesday ruled against a law banning “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ+ kids in Colorado, one of about two dozen states that ban the discredited practice.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about pharma delaying launches in Europe, Lilly and Biogen deals, and more
news.snippet: Drugmakers are delaying launches of some new medicines in Europe as the industry grapples with U.S. pressure ​and pricing policy shifts from President Trump

news.title: STAT+: Psychedelic biotechs face scrutiny over YouTube promos
news.snippet: Biogen and Eli Lilly make takeover moves, Doctors Without Borders slams Gilead, and more biotech news

news.title: STAT+: Biogen to acquire immunology biotech Apellis for $5.6 billion
news.snippet: Biogen is buying Apellis Pharmaceuticals for $5.6 billion upfront as it looks to expand its immunology business.

news.title: STAT+: Eli Lilly to buy Centessa Pharmaceuticals, maker of a narcolepsy drug, in $6.3B deal
news.snippet: Eli Lilly is buying Centessa Pharmaceuticals in a deal worth at least $6.3 billion, picking up a promising narcolepsy treatment.

news.title: STAT+: Biotech VCs move upstream in China’s scientific pipelines as competition grows fiercer
news.snippet: U.S. venture capital firms are no longer waiting for Chinese biotech assets to surface before investing in them — they’re moving upstream.

news.title: STAT+: Over-the-top psychedelic promos could undermine the field’s drug development efforts
news.snippet: How over-the-top social media videos about psychedelics could undermine the field’s efforts to get its drugs approved.
